description_long: This house is built on an irregular, elongated plot with a modern, low-profile design. The structure is concentrated at one end of the property, featuring flat roofs and a mix of geometric forms, likely constructed from concrete and glass. The exterior displays a combination of neutral tones, with some green and black accents, possibly representing landscaping and solar panels. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with large panes facing the open side of the lot, maximizing natural light and views. The entryway appears understated, with a simple door and minimal steps, blending seamlessly into the overall design. The house is surrounded by a modest amount of landscaping, with the majority of the lot left as open ground.
description: A modern, low-profile house with flat roofs, geometric forms, and asymmetrical window placement, set on an elongated plot with minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated lot, flat roof, and the main structure concentrated at one end.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the compact building footprint and the open expanse of the lot.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the asymmetrical arrangement of the house and the large window areas.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the overall layout, flat roof, and the distribution of landscaping and built area.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryway with a flat door, minimal steps, and no prominent porch or decorative elements
